channel.title: Theia Updates
channel.description: Updates from Theia on agent observability, memory orchestration, and workflow governance.

item.title: SEO and visibility release
item.description: Launched keyword landing pages, RSS, and richer internal linking for public discoverability.

item.title: Public lead intake now live
item.description: Website lead form is connected to HTTPS control-plane intake with secure origin allowlisting.
